title: Scholar Whooves
description: This mod has some custom blocks/items from my imagination and from my Pony OC, Cloudy Skies.
body:
This is a fabric 1.20.1 only, and Neoforge 1.20.6 and future versions. there will be a lot of my Pony OC, Friends items/blocks, and other items/blocks coming soon!

I don't own Doctor Who's Tardis or the Sonic Screwdriver

You can use this mod in mod packs
